name: hydra
description: Hydra runtime skills, hooks, and MCP metadata for Codex worker sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Codex worker workflows for Hydra-managed runs
interface.longDescription: Hydra packages reusable Codex skills for Linear workpads, GitHub pull requests, commits, debugging, and branch delivery inside Hydra-managed worker sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use Hydra to work the current Linear issue and keep the Codex Workpad updated.
Use Hydra to prepare, validate, and publish a repository change.
